description_long: This is a linear metal fence composed of evenly spaced vertical pickets connected by two horizontal rails. The pickets are topped with pointed finials, giving the fence a secure and slightly ornamental appearance. The structure is rigid and likely made of steel or wrought iron, providing durability and strength for urban environments. The finish is a dark, matte color, suggesting a protective coating against weathering. The fence is relatively low in height, suitable for demarcating boundaries without obstructing views. There are no visible gates or additional decorative elements beyond the pointed tops.
description: A low, dark metal fence with pointed pickets and two horizontal rails, designed for boundary marking and security.
description_view_0: The fence is seen from the end, showing the thin profile and the alignment of the vertical pickets.
description_view_1: A front view displaying the full length, pointed pickets, and two horizontal rails connecting the posts.
description_view_2: Another end view, mirroring view 0, highlighting the narrow side and vertical alignment.
description_view_3: A rear or alternate side view, similar to view 1, showing the full length and structure of the fence.
